# Saber fixtures (self-generated, CC0)

- `saber-mac-pens-text.sba` — Saber (Mac, format v19, 2026-07-09), one
  page drawn by the author: fountain pen x2 (one a single dot), pencil,
  highlighter, typed text. Pressure-enabled strokes carry raw 0-1
  pressure. App PDF export kept in corpus/ (gitignored).
